notes:
Initial draft manifest for P2 ComfyUI promotion gate. Populate `bindings` via `python -m backend.scripts.compute_manifest_hashes --write`, then transition `promotion_state` to `pending_review` -> `approved` (with `approver` + `approved_at` filled) before SimulationDeliveryGate (P2.2) consumes it.

Valid `scope`: production | staging | canary.
Valid `promotion_state`: draft | pending_review | approved | rejected | rolled_back.

`rollback_baseline.bindings` captures the previously-approved hash set so a rejected promotion can revert atomically; `rollback_baseline.manifest_ref` should be a git SHA or absolute path pointing to the prior manifest snapshot.
